SEQUENCE.COMMENT: logTicketComment- get counts on group of records in tfw_error_log table and sequentially traverse records and compare with their usd_known_count
lf count(*) is greater than usd_known_count(column)-> error has occured more times from last run and suitable to comment the comment
if count(*) is equal to usd_known_count(column) -> we do not comment the ticket
It consists of a sub service that moves old recors to a archive table.
This service is run on the IS scheduler on a set interval. It reads the tfw_error_log table

MAP.COMMENT: SELECT usd_ticket_number,ERROR_NUM,TO_CHAR(count(*)) AS myc ,usd_ticket_handle FROM TFW_ERROR_LOG GROUP BY ERROR_NUM,usd_ticket_handle,usd_ticket_number

Values.value: SELECT usd_ticket_number,ERROR_NUM,TO_CHAR(count(*)) AS myc ,usd_ticket_handle FROM TFW_ERROR_LOG GROUP BY ERROR_NUM,usd_ticket_handle,usd_ticket_number

INVOKE.COMMENT: GsQL(Current count :MYC)

MAP.COMMENT: SELECT usd_known_count FROM TFW_ERROR_LOG WHERE ERROR_NUM = '%error_number%' and error_num_guid= 0

Values.value: SELECT usd_known_count FROM TFW_ERROR_LOG WHERE ERROR_NUM = '%error_number%' AND ERROR_NUM_GUID = '0'

INVOKE.COMMENT: bsql,DB known count is myDBCount

SEQUENCE.NAME: myDBCount = $null
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: count was not updated to usd_known_count; total count is what usd_known_count is

MAP.COMMENT: UPDATE TFW_ERROR_LOG SET USD_KNOWN_COUNT = '%myknowncount%' WHERE ERROR_NUM = '%error_number%' AND ERROR_NUM_GUID = '0'

Values.value: UPDATE TFW_ERROR_LOG SET USD_KNOWN_COUNT = '%myknowncount%' WHERE ERROR_NUM = '%error_number%' AND ERROR_NUM_GUID = '0'

INVOKE.COMMENT: spSQL

SEQUENCE.NAME: myknowncount >1000
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: on the initial run count was greater than 1

MAP.COMMENT: set initial flag to Y as to comment the ticket

SEQUENCE.NAME: $default
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: if it is just 1 (just the zeroth record)

MAP.COMMENT: set initial comment to N as to not comment the ticket

BRANCH.COMMENT: check counts and make comments and send emails

INVOKE.COMMENT: host, port, environment
generate SID to log comment to a ticket
SID call returened bad. sid less than 4 digits

Values.value: SID call returened bad. sid less than 4 digits

INVOKE.COMMENT: SID call returened bad
get groupname and status of the ticket

MAP.COMMENT: drop - unusual document stranded in the pipeline

INVOKE.COMMENT: Call to get Status of the ticket and group is successful

Values.value: Call to get Status of the ticket and group is successful

INVOKE.COMMENT: tcktStatXML=node
node ==> Handle ==> group at 0 and status at 1
Call to get Status of the ticket and group is not successful

Values.value: Call to get Status of the ticket and group is not successful

INVOKE.COMMENT: Ticket is closed to log the comment . Will reopen the ticket and log the comment.

Values.value: Ticket is closed;updateObject to reopen USDticket call returned 200

INVOKE.COMMENT: Reopen the ticket to log comment

MAP.COMMENT: drop - unusual document stranded in the pipeline

INVOKE.COMMENT: Reopened USD ticket.updateObject USD call successful

Values.value: Reopened USD ticket.updateObject USD call successful

INVOKE.COMMENT: call unsuccessful;to reopen USD ticket.updateObject USD

Values.value: call unsuccessful;to reopen USD ticket.updateObject USD

INVOKE.COMMENT: Ticket is closed with exception

MAP.COMMENT: Ticket is open ; continue with the rest of the logic..set commentstatus=1

INVOKE.COMMENT: Service to log comment

SEQUENCE.NAME: StatusGroup =='AE7717D63A9FC84E8A158E77DFA861D6'
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: SDM internal identifier for ConnectivitySolutions -Engineering Support

INVOKE.COMMENT: To:csengineering@ipaper.com

Values.value:
Issue from USD:%usd_ticket_number% repeated %myknowncount% times
Please do not reply to this email. This mailbox is not monitored.

INVOKE.COMMENT: Email sent to csengineering@ipaper.com for usd:%usd_ticket_number%

Values.value: Email sent to csengineering@ipaper.com for usd:%usd_ticket_number%

SEQUENCE.NAME: StatusGroup == 'D9D129D4DBEDDB4BB21751C0843B1E67'
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: SDM internal identifier for ConnectivitySolutions -Client services&Support

INVOKE.COMMENT: To:Rick.Vollman@ipaper.com,Donnie.Huffman@ipaper.com,Ricky.Barron@ipaper.com,Victoria.Daniels@ipaper.com,David.Moyes@ipaper.com,George.Patton@ipaper.com,Rafal.Czarnecki@ipaper.com,Lolita.Mustafena@ipaper.com,Marcin.Fudala@ipaper.com

Values.value:
Issue from USD:%usd_ticket_number% repeated %myknowncount% times
Please do not reply to this email. This mailbox is not monitored.

INVOKE.COMMENT: Email sent to csclient support team members for usd:%usd_ticket_number%

Values.value: Email sent to csclient support team members for usd:%usd_ticket_number%

INVOKE.COMMENT: Unable to log comment. Please check. Status returned from log comment call is %/transportInfo/status%

Values.value: Unable to log comment. Please check. Status returned from log comment call is %/transportInfo/status%
Unable to log comment. Please check. Status returned from log comment call is %/transportInfo/status%

INVOKE.COMMENT: Successfully Logged the comment
Ticket Closed with exception. can't comment

Values.value: Ticket Closed with exception. can't comment

MAP.COMMENT: UPDATE TFW_ERROR_LOG SET USD_KNOWN_COUNT = '%knowncount%' WHERE ERROR_NUM = '%error_number%' AND ERROR_NUM_GUID = '0'

Values.value: UPDATE TFW_ERROR_LOG SET USD_KNOWN_COUNT = '%myknowncount%' WHERE ERROR_NUM = '%error_number%' AND ERROR_NUM_GUID = '0'

INVOKE.COMMENT: aSQL
Update to usd_known_count failed.Please check for missing zero record?

Values.value: Update to usd_known_count failed.Please check for missing zero record?

INVOKE.COMMENT: Logout of SDM
zero or more than 1 records at pulling usd_known_count for error number %error_number%

Values.value: zero or more than 1 records at pulling usd_known_count for error number %error_number%

INVOKE.COMMENT: Zero records retrieved at the start

Values.value: Zero records retrieved at the start, Exiting the flow.

INVOKE.COMMENT: host, port, environment
Start..Archiving Records
GsQL

BRANCH.COMMENT: check if we got 1 or more records

INVOKE.COMMENT: variables ttime= %ttime% and status=%status% reinitialized

MAP.COMMENT: SELECT max(entry_date) FROM TFW_ERROR_LOG WHERE ERROR_NUM = '%error_number%'

Values.value: SELECT max(entry_date) FROM TFW_ERROR_LOG WHERE ERROR_NUM = '%error_number%'

INVOKE.COMMENT: tSql
yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSSZ
calculate the time difference in minutes between MAX(ENTRY_DATE) and current date
minutes from last occurence %dateDifferenceMinutes%
generate SID to get status of a ticket
At get sid call %CurrentDate%

Values.value: At get sid call , Time -%CurrentDate% Status-%transportInfo/status%

INVOKE.COMMENT: SID call returned with %SDMsid%
SID less than 4 digits.
SID call returened empty. status :%transportInfo/status%
At get status call %CurrentDate%
get groupname and status of the ticket

node ==> Handle ==> group at 0 and status at 1

INVOKE.COMMENT: Ticket is closed . Moving to Archive tfw_error_log_archive table

INVOKE.COMMENT: Ticket is closed . Moving to Archive tfw_error_log_archive table

MAP.COMMENT: Ticket is open ; continue with the rest of the logic

INVOKE.COMMENT: Ticket is Open
unable to determine the status of ticket. check the error log

Values.value: After start transaction.. ttime-%ttime% and status-%status%

INVOKE.COMMENT: sSql
